title: CopyOptimizer
intent: Generate and score conversion copy variants before publication
requirements: assets module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
variants module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
scoring module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
experiments module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
promotion module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
analytics module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
